text.title: ADR Decay Detector Agent Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) + valid/invalid examples + forbidden patterns for kb-adr-decay-detector-agent output.

example.note: scanned_count must be ≥1; required adr_root, findings, review_queue_url missing.

list.item: wildcard values where enum is required
values outside enum / pattern / numeric bounds
